name: RadNet, Inc.
description: RadNet, Inc. is the leading national provider of freestanding, fixed-site outpatient diagnostic imaging services in the United States. With a network of over 400 centers across multiple states, the company offers a comprehensive range of imaging modalities, including MRI, CT, PET/CT, and 3D mammography. RadNet leverages advanced technology, including its proprietary eRAD software and DeepHealth artificial intelligence division, to enhance diagnostic accuracy and operational efficiency. Through strategic partnerships with hospitals and health systems, RadNet focuses on delivering high-quality, cost-effective radiology solutions to patients, providers, and payors nationwide.
